name: fireflyiii-mcp
description: MCP server for Firefly III (daften/fireflyiii-mcp). Launched with a pre-built dist — no npm install required.

FIREFLY_III_ACCESS_TOKEN.description: Personal access token from Firefly III (Profile > OAuth > Personal Access Tokens).

FIREFLY_III_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of your Firefly III instance, e.g. https://firefly.example.com (no trailing slash).
